CustomField.description: Please note: The data stored in this field is linked to the HomeKeeper National Data Hub. Do not change the picklist values or hide this field from the layout. This is where the seller went when they sold their home. Did they buy another home? Are they renting?
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This is where the seller went when they sold their home. Did they buy another home? Are they renting?
CustomField.label: Next Home Tenure Type
